title: Heart of Darkness
author: Joseph Conrad
content: “The mind of man is capable of anything—because everything is in it, all the past as well as all the future.”

title: A Good Man is Hard to Find
author: Flannery O'Connor
content: “She would of been a good woman if it had been somebody there to shoot her every minute of her life.”
action: Do not wait for crisis to act.

title: Native Son
author: Richard Wright
content: “What I killed for must've been good!”
action: Examine the roots of your drive.

title: The Glass Menagerie
author: Tennessee Williams
content: “I have been foolish, but I have been honest.”

title: Invisible Man
author: Ralph Ellison
content: “Life is to be lived, not controlled; and humanity is won by continuing to play in face of certain defeat.”
